'''âk-w-g-h''' ('''kakawgehoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:xenotransfuse|xenotransfuse]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-w-g-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xenotransfuse|xenotransfuse]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-w-g-h
|-
! Lemma
| kakawgehoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikawgehoko|thikawgehoko]] || [[word:jikawgehoko|jikawgehoko]] || [[word:shikawgehoko|shikawgehoko]] || [[word:kikawgehoko|kikawgehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukawgehoko|thuthukawgehoko]] || [[word:jujukawgehoko|jujukawgehoko]] || [[word:shushukawgehoko|shushukawgehoko]] || [[word:kukukawgehoko|kukukawgehoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokawgehoko|thokawgehoko]] || [[word:jokawgehoko|jokawgehoko]] || [[word:shokawgehoko|shokawgehoko]] || [[word:kokawgehoko|kokawgehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠkawgehoko|thĂŠkawgehoko]] || [[word:jĂŠkawgehoko|jĂŠkawgehoko]] || [[word:shĂŠkawgehoko|shĂŠkawgehoko]] || [[word:kĂŠkawgehoko|kĂŠkawgehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakawgehoko|thathakawgehoko]] || [[word:jajakawgehoko|jajakawgehoko]] || [[word:shashakawgehoko|shashakawgehoko]] || [[word:kakakawgehoko|kakakawgehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakawgehoko|thakawgehoko]] || [[word:jakawgehoko|jakawgehoko]] || [[word:shakawgehoko|shakawgehoko]] || [[word:kakawgehoko|kakawgehoko]]
|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
